title: lathyrus variabilis
intro: Lathyrus variabilis, also known as the variable pea or lesser pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The seeds of Lathyrus variabilis can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infusions, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
